consistency.level_and_school: Level 1 Abjuration is standard for defensive buffs.
consistency.components: V, S, M components are clearly listed, including a description for the material component.
consistency.duration: Concentration is appropriate for an ongoing buff of this nature.

quality.completeness: All required fields are present and populated.
quality.clarity: The description is clear: grants +2 AC as a bonus action.

mechanics.action_economy: Bonus Action casting time is strong for an early-level spell, allowing immediate action economy impact.
mechanics.power_level: A permanent +2 to AC for 10 minutes (with concentration) is very powerful for a 1st-level spell, especially given its low action cost. This is benchmarked as a high-value concentration buff for level 1.
mechanics.range: 60 feet range is excellent for application to an ally.
mechanics.synergy: Works well with frontline characters (Cleric/Paladin) who benefit most from AC stacking.

suggestions: The mechanical value (+2 AC) is at the very high end for a 1st-level spell, especially since it can be cast before combat begins (if the caster knows it will happen soon) or used as a swift reaction to impending threat via the Bonus Action casting time.
